label: Workable
description: Connect to Workable to read jobs, candidates, and pipeline data from your applicant tracking system.

form.title: Connect Workable
form.subtitle: Paste your Workable API token and subdomain to give Anton access to your hiring data.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste an access token from Workable's Settings → Integrations → Access Tokens along with your company subdomain. Quickest setup, no OAuth client required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Workable API Access Token

### Steps

1. Log in to your Workable account at `yourcompany.workable.com`.
2. Click your avatar (top-right) → **Settings**.
3. In the left sidebar, go to **Integrations → Access Tokens**.
4. Click **Generate new token**.
5. Give the token a descriptive name like `Anton Integration` and set the appropriate scopes (read access to jobs, candidates, and pipelines is usually sufficient).
6. Click **Generate**. Copy the token immediately — Workable will not show it again.
7. Paste the token into the **API Token** field below.
8. Enter your Workable **subdomain** (the part before `.workable.com`, e.g. `yourcompany`).

### Notes

- The token is shown only once. If you lose it, revoke it from the same Access Tokens page and generate a new one.
- Tokens are scoped to your Workable account and carry the permissions of the user who created them.
- If you do not see the Access Tokens section, check that your Workable plan supports API access or that you have admin rights.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Found under Settings → Integrations → Access Tokens. Shown only once when generated.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.label: Workable Subdomain
fields.description: The part of your Workable URL before .workable.com — e.g. if your URL is acme.workable.com, enter acme.

methods.label: OAuth 2.0 (BYOK)
methods.description: Authorize via Workable's OAuth 2.0 flow using your own OAuth client credentials. Best for multi-account or partner integrations where token-level access control is needed.
methods.how_to:
## Connect Workable via OAuth 2.0

This method uses Workable's OAuth 2.0 flow. You must register an OAuth application in the Workable Partner Dashboard to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret.

### Steps

1. Go to the [Workable Developer Portal](https://developers.workable.com/) and sign in.
2. Navigate to **My Apps → Create new app**.
3. Fill in your app name, description, and set the redirect URI to `http://127.0.0.1` (Anton uses a local redirect).
4. After saving, copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** from the app detail page.
5. Paste them into the fields below and click **Submit** to launch the browser consent flow.
6. Log in with your Workable account and approve the requested scopes.

### Notes

- The Client Secret is sensitive — treat it like a password.
- If the requested scopes exceed what your Workable plan allows, authorization will fail with a scope error.
- Refresh tokens are issued automatically; Anton will renew access without re-prompting you.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: OAuth Client ID
fields.description: From the Workable Developer Portal under your registered app's credentials.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: Paired with the Client ID. Keep this value private.
